title: Linux External Remote Service Abuse
description: Detects suspicious use of external remote services (SSH, VPN, RDP via xfreerdp) from unusual or unauthorized sources. Attackers abuse external-facing remote services with stolen or default credentials to gain initial access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'sshd' and msg like '*Accepted*') or ((msg like '*openvpn*' or msg like '*wireguard*' or msg like '*strongswan*')) or ((msg like '*xfreerdp*' or msg like '*rdesktop*')))

tests.test_name: Running Chrome VPN Extensions via the Registry 2 vpn extension
